query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS landing_page_sellers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  landing_page_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  seller_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_lp_seller (landing_page_id, seller_id),
  INDEX idx_lps_landing_page_id (landing_page_id),
  INDEX idx_lps_seller_id (seller_id)
);
